cad_masters.notes: Subsystem plan and parametric intent; no dimensions, tuning, wind-pressure, or CAD geometry.
Symbolic relationship table only; every row Authority=pending_measurement, no numeric values. This is the closest thing this repo has to a design table.
Source-only (not executed); hand-authored symbolic pinned-barrel/windchest/pipe-rank relationship model; every numeric input is commented as an estimate pending measurement.
Thin Wolfram entry point; source-only, not fabrication authority.

notes: No cad/barrel-organ.scad (or equivalent OpenSCAD/DXF) master exists yet and none was authored during the 2026-07-01 V5 refresh pass — see cad/README.md for the full no-scad rationale. This is a complex mechanism repo (pinned barrel + crank/drive train + followers/trackers/pallets + bellows/reservoir + windchest + pipe rank + case) whose design tables are explicitly symbolic-only (parametric-design-table.md) with no numeric barrel diameter, pin/follower pitch, windchest channel count, or bellows footprint to source a parametric envelope from. design.md and the Wolfram model above are cited as the current best-available intent sources instead of a CAD master. Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not yet run.
